scripts.server: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix server run dev
scripts.client: npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix client start
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:browser
scripts.test:unit: npm --prefix server test && npm --prefix client test
scripts.test:integration: npm --prefix server run test:integration && npm --prefix client run test:integration
